items.name: accordion
items.when: collapsible Q&A / grouped detail sections; one or many open

items.name: alert
items.when: inline callout (info/destructive) inside a page — not a toast, not a dialog

items.name: alert-dialog
items.when: REVIEW SURFACE before an irreversible action (delete/send) — names the target, confirm/cancel; required before any bulk mutation

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.when: media/embed boxes that must keep a ratio while resizing

items.name: avatar
items.when: person/org identity dot with image + initials fallback

items.name: badge
items.when: status chip; prefer the primitives Badge wrapper for Nexus tones (ok/warn/danger/accent)

items.name: breadcrumb
items.when: hierarchical location trail (Settings / Team / Member)

items.name: button
items.when: every action; prefer the primitives Button wrapper (variant/size/busy/icon API)

items.name: calendar
items.when: date picking (react-day-picker); pairs with popover for a date-picker field

items.name: card
items.when: raised content container with header/footer slots; .nxCard is the lighter token twin

items.name: carousel
items.when: horizontally swiped media/item strip (embla)

items.name: chart
items.when: recharts wrapper bound to the token palette (--chart-1..5); dashboards + trend blocks

items.name: checkbox
items.when: boolean field / row selection; wrapper Checkbox gives the simple checked/onChange API

items.name: collapsible
items.when: show-more region without accordion semantics

items.name: command
items.when: typeahead lists + the ⌘K palette (cmdk); the starter wires CommandPalette on it

items.name: context-menu
items.when: right-click menus on rows/cards

items.name: dialog
items.when: modal for a focused task (create/edit form); wrapper Dialog gives title/footer API

items.name: drawer
items.when: bottom sheet on mobile-ish flows (vaul)

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.when: kebab/row action menus; wrapper Menu gives trigger+items API

items.name: field
items.when: labeled field scaffolding (Field/FieldGroup/FieldLabel…) used by newer blocks; form.tsx remains the react-hook-form wiring

items.name: form
items.when: react-hook-form + zod field wiring (FormField/FormItem/FormMessage) for validated forms

items.name: hover-card
items.when: rich preview on hover (person card over a mention)

items.name: input
items.when: single-line text entry; wrapper Input adds invalid→aria-invalid

items.name: input-otp
items.when: segmented one-time-code entry

items.name: label
items.when: accessible field labels tied to inputs

items.name: menubar
items.when: app-level horizontal menu (File/Edit style)

items.name: navigation-menu
items.when: marketing/site-style top navigation with panels

items.name: pagination
items.when: page-by-page navigation for long lists (record-core tables usually filter instead)

items.name: popover
items.when: small anchored panel (filter builder, emoji picker); not a menu, not a dialog

items.name: progress
items.when: determinate progress bar; pair with async-run surfaces

items.name: radio-group
items.when: single choice among few visible options

items.name: resizable
items.when: split panes with draggable handles (react-resizable-panels)

items.name: scroll-area
items.when: styled scroll container for bounded internal scroll

items.name: select
items.when: single choice among many options (composed listbox); raw <select class=nxInput> stays fine for tiny enum cells

items.name: separator
items.when: hairline divider

items.name: sheet
items.when: side panel over content (record peek, filters) — the ZOOM step without leaving the list

items.name: sidebar
items.when: full app-shell sidebar system (collapsible groups, mobile behavior); the starter shell is a lighter hand-rolled twin — adopt this when an app outgrows it

items.name: skeleton
items.when: loading placeholders shaped like the content

items.name: slider
items.when: numeric range input

items.name: sonner
items.when: toast system (Toaster + toast()); the starter ships its own minimal toast — pick ONE per app

items.name: switch
items.when: on/off setting with immediate effect

items.name: table
items.when: styled table primitives; record-core DataTable is the batteries-included grid on top

items.name: tabs
items.when: in-page view switching; wrapper Tabs gives the {tabs,value,onValueChange} API

items.name: textarea
items.when: multi-line text entry

items.name: toggle
items.when: pressed/unpressed tool button

items.name: toggle-group
items.when: exclusive or multi toggle row (view switches)

items.name: tooltip
items.when: hover hint; wrapper Tip gives label+child API

items.name: use-mobile
items.when: hook: viewport-below-768 boolean (sidebar dependency)

items.name: login-03
items.when: copy-out starting screen: card login with provider slots — richer than the starter's built-in gate
items.source: shadcn/ui new-york-v4 block (MIT — NOTICE.md); copy-out example tissue, not a runtime import

items.name: sidebar-07
items.import: src/blocks/sidebar-07/page.tsx · src/blocks/sidebar-07/app-sidebar.tsx · src/blocks/sidebar-07/nav-main.tsx · src/blocks/sidebar-07/nav-projects.tsx · src/blocks/sidebar-07/nav-user.tsx · src/blocks/sidebar-07/team-switcher.tsx
items.when: copy-out starting shell: collapsible sidebar app frame (breadcrumb header, icon rail) — adopt when an app outgrows the starter's hand-rolled shell
items.source: shadcn/ui new-york-v4 block (MIT — NOTICE.md); copy-out example tissue, not a runtime import

items.name: Button
items.when: the house button API (variant primary/secondary/ghost/danger · size sm/md · busy · icon) over vendored button

items.name: Input · Badge · Micro · Tabs/TabPanel · Checkbox · Tip
items.when: house APIs over vendored input/badge/tabs/checkbox/tooltip + the Micro eyebrow

items.name: Dialog · Menu
items.when: house APIs over vendored dialog/dropdown-menu (title+footer / trigger+items)

items.name: SettingsTabs
items.when: generic settings shell: sticky tab bar (tabs-as-config: key/label/icon/render) + body, own active-tab state — page head stays app content

items.name: EditableRuleList
items.when: config-driven editable rule/policy list: inline add/edit card, optional severity chip (enum+colors as props) and active toggle, over any object — no fetch inside, onCreate/onPatch/onRemove callback contract like DataTable

items.name: ThinkingDots
items.when: the 'AI is working' indicator (three bouncing accent dots); tokenized + reduced-motion aware — drop in beside any agent/task-run affordance

items.name: Markdown · renderMarkdown
items.when: dependency-free Markdown → React renderer (inline bold/italic/code + block headings/lists/quotes/fenced code/tables/rules); tokenized in markdown.css — for agent replies and short rich text

items.name: DataTable
items.when: config-driven grid: sort, selection, inline edit, relation link cells, numeric alignment — see docs/record-core.md

items.name: KanbanBoard
items.when: config-driven board over the object's stageField; drag or stage-select moves cards

items.name: RecordPage
items.when: record anatomy: header + fields panel (inline edit, enrich affordance) + Timeline (activity composer, per-kind icons) / Notes / Files tabs

items.name: NotionEditor
items.when: Notion-grade block editor for the richText field type: hand-rolled contenteditable blocks (p/h/quote/list/divider/image/table), slash menu, drag-reorder, inline markdown, image-drop; controlled (blocks/onChange) + inline-change props for a suggestions layer

items.name: useSuggestions · Suggestion
items.when: the accept/reject/undo engine for inline tracked changes over a Block[] document: folds an accepted change's original into replacement in the doc, tracks each change's status; entity-agnostic (no object/api coupling), pairs with SuggestionPanel + NotionEditor's inline-change props

items.name: SuggestionPanel
items.when: the review rail for inline tracked changes: one card per change (del to ins diff + reason), accept/reject on pending + undo on resolved, bulk accept-all/reject-all, progress; pure presentational, wired to the useSuggestions callbacks

items.name: Pipeline · Chip
items.when: generic horizontal state indicator over a config-declared set of states (done/current/in-progress steps) plus the Chip status pill it is built from; states are plain strings the caller supplies

items.name: FilterBar · FilterChips · matchFilters · opsFor · filterableFields
items.when: advanced filtering: command-style filter builder (any column, type-aware operators) + removable active-filter chips + a pure matchFilters(row,conds) predicate; filterableFields(fields) maps an object's fields to the filterable set

items.name: ChartView
items.when: config-driven chart: one bar per group option, Count or Σ numeric measure — the third view family beside table/board

items.name: ViewDefinition · ViewProps · ViewInstanceConfig
items.when: the view-type contract: what a views/<type>/definition.tsx default-exports (label/icon/component/toolbar/config schema) and the props every view receives from its host

items.name: viewDefinitions · getViewDefinition
items.when: build-time self-registering view registry (import.meta.glob over views/*/definition) — drop a folder = a new view type in every consumer's switcher, zero switcher edits

items.name: buildRegistry · configuredViewsFor
items.when: the registry's pure core (no browser, no vite — node-testable): fold glob modules into the type map; derive an object's view tabs (declared `views` or the legacy table/board/chart set)

items.name: groupableFields · measurableFields · resolveGroupBy
items.when: shared grouping derivations for board/chart views and their host: which fields can group, which can measure, and the groupBy fallback chain (runtime pick → instance config → stageField → first groupable)

items.name: GroupByMenu
items.when: the shared group-by picker rendered by both board and chart toolbars (same viewState.groupBy — regroup one, the other follows)

items.name: table view definition
items.when: the built-in table view: DataTable behind the ViewProps contract + the Columns visibility menu as its toolbar

items.name: gallery view definition
items.when: the built-in gallery view: cover-card masonry (coverField/titleField/metaFields/cardSize config) — cards open the peek; lazy component

items.name: packColumns · visibleIndices · cardHeight · columnCountForWidth
items.when: the gallery's pure masonry math (node-testable): deterministic shortest-column packing over exact card heights + viewport windowing

items.name: form view definition
items.when: the built-in form view: config-driven fill-one-record intake (fields/requiredOverrides/submitLabel/successMode) submitting through ViewProps.onCreate; lazy component

items.name: coerceDraft · validateDraft · withStageDefault · requiredKeys · coerceScalar · listValidators · formSupported
items.when: the draft pure core every create surface shares (dialog, wizard, form): typed-string coercion, config-implied validation mirroring the server, stage defaulting; registered field types plug their coerce/validate slots into the same pipeline

items.name: Draft* editors · MoneyField · ListField · AddressField · FullNameField · MultiSelectField · ArrayField · DateField
items.when: the per-type field editors: draft-mode controlled editors for every built-in type plus the shaped record-page editors (moved here from RecordPage, which re-exports them)

items.name: fieldDraftEditor
items.when: host-side draft-editor lookup over the field-type registry, text-editor fallback for unregistered types

items.name: built-in field-type definitions (22 folders)
items.when: one fields/<type>/definition.ts per built-in type registering its Draft editor on the field-type registry — the pattern a NEW field type copies

items.name: kanban view definition
items.when: the built-in board view: KanbanBoard behind the ViewProps contract + group-by and per-column rollup pickers as its toolbar

items.name: chart view definition
items.when: the built-in chart view: ChartView behind the ViewProps contract + measure and group-by pickers as its toolbar

items.name: grid view definition
items.when: the Sheet view: Excel-grade bulk editing over an object's records (glide-data-grid) — fill-handle, range select, TSV copy/paste, keyboard cell-nav, frozen primary column; the component ships as a lazy chunk

items.name: SpreadsheetView
items.when: the grid view surface: columns from the object's fields, native + custom (select/multiselect/user chip) cells, every commit one merged onPatch per touched row, paste/fill coerced per target field, row markers synced to the host bulk bar

items.name: cellDescFor · isGridEditable · coerceFromText · textForCopy
items.when: the grid's pure cell-mapping core (no glide, no browser — node-testable): field type → cell kind, the editable set, paste/fill text coercion that rejects impossible values

items.name: deriveSelectionText · relLuminance · contrastRatio
items.when: the grid's pure selection-contrast core (no glide, no browser — node-testable): when a skin or theme leaves the selection background too close to the base ink, derive the flipped text ramp (WCAG luminance, white/black pole) that SpreadsheetView applies as a per-cell themeOverride on selected cells

items.name: useGridTheme · deriveGridTheme · deriveSelectionText · chipColorLiterals · resolveCssColor
items.when: token → glide Theme derivation for canvas paint: probe-resolved --nx-* literals, chip colors from the exact chipStyle color-mix formula, and the selected-cell contrast text ramp — all re-derived on dark-mode flip and skin arrival

items.name: selectRenderer · multiselectRenderer · userRenderer
items.when: custom canvas cells for select/multiselect/user: chip and avatar drawing from pre-resolved literals + DOM overlay editors sharing the DOM chip styling

items.name: provideGridEditor
items.when: replacement overlay editors for glide's built-in text/uri/number cells: commit from local state via onFinishedEditing (the library's own commit chain drops values under React 18 StrictMode), guarded blur-commit for click-away

items.name: flow view definition
items.when: the flow (node-graph) view registry entry: records-as-graph config (relationField/labelField), plain-language validation, and the relation-picker toolbar; the canvas loads as a lazy chunk

items.name: FlowView
items.when: the records-as-graph canvas (lazy): record cards + cross-object hub chips as xyflow nodes, one configured relation as edges, pan/zoom/minimap/drag-arrange with per-relation drag positions persisted in the view-state bag

items.name: buildGraph · resolveRelation · resolveLabelField · positionsFor · positionsPatch
items.when: the flow view's pure core (node-testable, JSX-free): relation resolution, node/edge derivation from the _refs id decoration (self-relation record edges, cross-object/polymorphic hubs), drag-position persistence shapes

items.name: layoutGraph · bfsGrid
items.when: flow auto-layout: dagre TB up to 2,000 nodes, an O(V+E) BFS-rank grid above it — imported only by the lazy canvas chunk so dagre stays out of the eager bundle

items.name: calendar view definition
items.when: the calendar view (FullCalendar month/week, lazy chunk): drag-to-reschedule PATCHes the record's date field, empty-day click seeds a prefilled create, event colors come from the colorField's own select-option palette; Month/Week toggle as its toolbar; mobile swaps the grid for a virtualized agenda list

items.name: rowsToEvents · patchForDrop · patchForResize · firstDateField
items.when: pure record→event mapping for the calendar view (node-testable): date vs dateTime semantics, inclusive⇄exclusive span-end conversion, malformed-data normalization, agenda day grouping

items.name: map view definition
items.when: the map view: records with lat/lng as token pins (≤25) or GL clusters, record-card popups into the peek, a without-location count chip; config latField/lngField/titleField/colorField — the heavy component is a lazy chunk, maplibre loads only when a map renders

items.name: CLUSTER_THRESHOLD · inferCoordFields · splitRows · toFeatureCollection · boundsOf · mapDefaultConfig · mapValidateConfig
items.when: the map view's pure geo core (no browser — node-testable): coordinate inference + validity (0 is a valid coordinate), the located/without split, GeoJSON + bounds math, config default/validate

items.name: RecordCard
items.when: shared compact record card (title + meta values over formatCell/OptionChip) for record-as-card surfaces — map popups, gallery tiles; chrome-less, the host provides the card shell

items.name: ObjectConfig · FieldDef · RecordRow · ViewDef · TimelineEvent · FileMeta
items.when: the config-driven object model — the schema every record surface renders from

items.name: FieldTypeDefinition · FieldRenderProps · FieldCellProps · FieldDraftProps
items.when: the field-type contract: what a fields/<type>/definition.tsx default-exports — record-page render, list cell, previewText, layout/filterable/keyboard capabilities, plus the Draft/coerce/validate editor slots

items.name: fieldTypeDefinitions · getFieldTypeDefinition · fieldPreviewText · fieldIsBlock
items.when: build-time self-registering field-type registry (import.meta.glob over fields/*/definition) — hosts consult it BEFORE their built-in switches, so a new field type is a dropped folder, zero switch edits

items.name: buildFieldRegistry · registry capability helpers
items.when: the field registry's pure core (no browser, no vite — node-testable): fold glob modules into the type map + one-line capability reads that tolerate unregistered types

items.name: whiteboard field type
items.when: a per-record excalidraw canvas as a FIELD: lazy full editor on the record page (debounced one-patch saves, theme-follow, mobile tap-to-edit overlay), memoized theme-aware SVG thumbnails in cells, scene JSON through the normal store path

items.name: Wizard
items.when: config-driven guided flow: question set (kinds select/text/long/list/sources) → step engine with progress + slide anim → onComplete; a guided-vs-blank landing; host supplies questions + callbacks

items.name: ModalOverlay
items.when: lightweight centered overlay shell (backdrop + escape/close) for a full-page-or-popup wizard

items.name: ChipListInput
items.when: chip composer: type + enter to add removable tag chips — the list-kind wizard input, reusable standalone

items.name: SourcesInput
items.when: URL list + file-pick source composer (readFile overridable) — the sources-kind wizard input

items.name: CopilotPanel · CopilotToggle
items.when: docked AI copilot side-panel: conversation state + Markdown replies + tool-use chips (host injects the transport + per-turn context), plus the toggle button; config-driven (title/mark/emptyStateCopy/suggestions)

items.name: ShortcutsOverlay
items.when: keyboard-shortcuts help modal (host toggles it, typically on `?`): host passes shortcut GROUPS — a core shell group vs an app/config-driven group — the overlay renders the reference and claims Escape/? in capture while open; pairs with the starter's keyboard-nav layer

items.name: MobileReviewBanner
items.when: generic phone bottom step-through: prev / index-of-total / next over a set of N items plus per-item action buttons (accept/reject/default tones); pure presentation, fixed above a bottom tab bar (--nx-mobilenav-h), hidden on desktop — e.g. stepping a record set or suggestions on mobile

items.name: Skin · skinToCss() · applySkin()
items.when: brand-as-data: a small JSON in, the full --nx-* set out (accent ramp, chrome, radius, fonts, labels, density, shadows, dark derivation, raw overrides) — see docs/THEMING.md

items.name: skinPresets (nexus · ember · warm-opt)
items.when: built-in skins: the house identity, a full-range org example (dark chrome, sharp corners, own palette/type), and a warm option-chip palette preset (skin-overridable; default palette unchanged)

items.name: --nx-* custom properties
items.when: the blank canvas: palette/type/geometry/motion + chrome/label tokens; light+dark first-class; skins WRITE this at runtime, an app's design lock edits it statically

items.name: nx motion utilities
items.when: riseIn/popIn entrance families + .nx-tap-scale/.nx-hover-lift micro-interactions, tokenized on the ease vars; ONE reduced-motion guard (opt back in with data-motion="always")

items.name: resolveCssColor · resolveTokenColor · useTokenColors · subscribeTokenColors
items.when: token → rgba-literal resolution for GL/canvas consumers that cannot read CSS custom properties (maplibre paint, canvas grids); resolves any color expression incl. color-mix chains, re-resolves live on data-theme / skin-tag / OS-scheme changes

items.name: shadcn semantic bridge
items.when: maps shadcn variables onto --nx-* + Tailwind v4 @theme; import AFTER tokens.css

items.name: usePollRev
items.when: live-sync: poll a revision counter, fire onChange when another writer bumped it (transport-agnostic fetchRev; pauses while the tab is hidden)

items.name: useAsyncOp · computeAsyncOp
items.when: drive a long off-machine op with a stall guard: poll while in-flight, onSettle once, stalled past a threshold (injectable clock)

items.name: useDebouncedSave · createDebouncer
items.when: debounced autosave: coalesce rapid edits into ONE persist + a saveState (idle→saving→saved)

items.name: cn()
items.when: class merge (clsx + tailwind-merge) — the shadcn contract
